entity.label: Jattir
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Pre-eminent, a city in the mountains of Judah (Josh. 15:48; 21:14).

nodes.label: Jattir
nodes.description: Pre-eminent, a city in the mountains of Judah (Josh. 15:48; 21:14).

verses.text: And in the mountains, Shamir, and Jattir, and Socoh,
And Jattir with her suburbs, and Eshtemoa with her suburbs,
To them which were in Bethel, and to them which were in south Ramoth, and to them which were in Jattir,
And to the sons of Aaron they gave the cities of Judah, namely, Hebron, the city of refuge, and Libnah with her suburbs, and Jattir, and Eshtemoa, with their suburbs,
